title: Polyglot workspace registry
description: Single source of truth for sibling polyglot packages. Read by scripts/workspace/{bootstrap,emit-*,doctor,subtree-*}.sh.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier, unique across the registry.

local_path.description: Where the sibling repo is cloned on disk, relative to the orchestration shell root.

shell_path.description: Where inside the orchestration shell the symlink to local_path is created.

language.description: Drives which emitter and Makefile fragment iterates this entry.

subtree_prefix.description: Path inside the assembled release branch where the subtree lands.

default_ref.description: Branch or tag pulled at release-assembly time.
